input.question: Show me my equity portfolio with holdings, daily P&L, sector allocation and YTD performance
input.original_question: Show me my equity portfolio with holdings, daily P&L, sector allocation and YTD performance

data.enhanced_question: Show me my equity portfolio with a detailed table of holdings including ticker symbol, number of shares, current price, market value, and portfolio weight percentage. Provide the total portfolio daily P&L with both the absolute dollar change and percentage change compared to the previous close. Include a sector allocation breakdown showing the percentage and value for each sector. Display the overall year-to-date (YTD) performance percentage for the portfolio.

metadata.enhancement_summary: Added specific metrics for holdings details (ticker, shares, price, weight), daily P&L (absolute and percentage), sector allocation (percentages), and YTD performance to the user question.
metadata.original_question: Show me my equity portfolio with holdings, daily P&L, sector allocation and YTD performance
